lineage.Process: CreateLocator CAN "D:\City_STUFF\Create_Locator_v4\results\processing.gdb\Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB PointAddress" 'PointAddress.CITY Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.City';'PointAddress.REGION Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.Prov';'PointAddress.REGION_ABBR Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.Prov_Abbriviation';'PointAddress.COUNTRY Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.CountryCode';'PointAddress.STREET_NAME Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.FullStreetName';'PointAddress.HOUSE_NUMBER Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.Add_Number';'PointAddress.SUB_ADDRESS_LEVEL Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.FLOOR';'PointAddress.SUB_ADDRESS_UNIT Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.Add_Number';'PointAddress.NEIGHBORHOOD Parcels_Condo_Temp_GDB.Nbrhd_Comm' D:\City_STUFF\Create_Locator_v4\locators\condo_address_l.loc ENG # # # LOCAL_EXTRA_HIGH CURRENT_VERSION
